name: Walmart Money Center
description_short: Walmart Money Center at Joliet Road offers check cashing, money transfers, bill payment, and financial services in a single location within a Walmart store in Hodgkins, Illinois.
description_long:
Walmart Money Centers operate as in-store financial service hubs designed to provide convenient access to essential money management services. The Joliet Road location, situated in the Quarry Shopping Center in Hodgkins, Illinois, is part of Walmart's broader network of financial service locations integrated directly into retail stores. This particular center serves the Cook County area and operates extended hours (6 AM–11 PM daily) to accommodate working customers.

The Joliet Road Walmart Money Center offers a comprehensive range of financial services beyond basic check cashing. These include money transfer services (domestic and to Mexico), bill payment processing, check printing, tax preparation services, and access to various prepaid card products such as Walmart MoneyCard, Bluebird Account, and Netspend Visa. The center also provides Walmart credit card applications, reloadable debit cards, gift card sales (personal and corporate), installment financing options, and PayPal services. This consolidation of services into one location positions the center as an accessible alternative to traditional banks for customers seeking multiple financial transactions in one visit.

The distinguishing factor for this location is its integration within a Walmart store, which provides convenience through extended retail hours and co-location with grocery and general merchandise shopping. Customers can handle money management tasks while conducting regular shopping, potentially saving time. The range of prepaid card options and international money transfer capabilities (specifically to Mexico) reflect Walmart's strategic positioning to serve diverse customer populations, including immigrant communities and unbanked/underbanked consumers.

However, potential customers should note that detailed pricing information, fee structures, and specific terms for services are not disclosed on the website. The lack of customer reviews (zero reviews listed) prevents independent assessment of service quality, customer satisfaction, or operational reliability. Additionally, while the service menu is extensive, actual availability of all listed services at this specific location would need to be confirmed by phone, as websites for individual franchise locations may not always reflect real-time service offerings.
pros: Extended operating hours (6 AM–11 PM, seven days per week) accommodate working customers
One-stop shop offering check cashing, money transfers, bill payment, and financial services in a single location
International money transfer services available, including transfers to Mexico
Multiple prepaid card options (Walmart MoneyCard, Bluebird Account, Netspend Visa) for unbanked customers
Co-located with Walmart retail store for convenient bundling with shopping trips
Tax preparation services available in-store, eliminating need for separate appointment
Installment financing options provide alternative to payday loans for qualifying purchases
cons: No pricing or fee information disclosed on website; customers must call or visit in person
Zero customer reviews make it impossible to assess actual service quality or reliability
Service availability at this specific location not confirmed; website menu may not reflect real operations
Limited transparency on approval rates, credit requirements, or eligibility criteria for financial products
No online service options mentioned; services require in-person visits during operating hours
best_for: Walmart shoppers who need to cash checks or transfer money while shopping
Unbanked and underbanked consumers seeking alternative financial services without a traditional bank account
Immigrants and others needing to send money internationally, particularly to Mexico
Customers seeking consolidated financial services to avoid multiple stops at different providers
diagnosis: This location is best for Walmart customers in the Hodgkins area who need check cashing, money transfers, or bill payment services with extended convenience hours. The main caveat is that no pricing, fees, or customer reviews are available online; service quality and actual service availability at this location must be verified by calling (708) 387-2090 directly.
services: Money transfers (domestic and international to Mexico)
